rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 6/10 with identical strengths and substantively identical concerns. The only differences are trivial rewordings: the justification appends the capital-markets point (which already appears in the concerns list of both), and 'No mention of Windows platform experience' becomes 'Lack of Windows platform experience' — same substantive concern. None of these differences key off the Berlin-to-Bucharest location change; they are within ordinary run-to-run noise.
